queries.question: For every coffee plantation, list the processing techniques used.
queries.sql: select coffee_plantations.name , processing_techniques.technique_name from Coffee_Plantations_Processing_Techniques join Processing_Techniques on Coffee_Plantations_Processing_Techniques.processing_technique_id = Processing_Techniques.technique_id join Coffee_Plantations on Coffee_Plantations_Processing_Techniques.coffee_plantation_id = Coffee_Plantations.plantation_id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/agriculture#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/agriculture/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?technique_name WHERE {
  ?coffee_plantations_processing_techniques a :Coffee_Plantations_Processing_Techniques .
  ?processing_techniques a :Processing_Techniques .
  ?coffee_plantations_processing_techniques p:hasProcessing_Techniques ?processing_techniques .
  ?coffee_plantations a :Coffee_Plantations .
  ?coffee_plantations_processing_techniques p:hasCoffee_Plantations ?coffee_plantations .
  ?coffee_plantations p:name ?name .
  ?processing_techniques p:name ?technique_name .
}

queries.question: Give me the processing techniques each coffee plantation uses.
queries.sql: SELECT Processing_Techniques.technique_name  from Coffee_Plantations_Processing_Techniques join Processing_Techniques on Coffee_Plantations_Processing_Techniques.processing_technique_id = Processing_Techniques.technique_id join Coffee_Plantations on Coffee_Plantations_Processing_Techniques.coffee_plantation_id = Coffee_Plantations.plantation_id   GROUP BY Coffee_Plantations_Processing_Techniques.processing_technique_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Coffee_Plantations_Processing_Techniques.coffee_plantation_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Coffee_Plantations)

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me the processing techniques each coffee plantation uses.
